parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
MsgRepaySlashedTrustDeposit defines the message for repaying a slashed trust deposit.
[MOD-TD-MSG-6] Any authorized operator CAN execute this on behalf of a corporation.

post.summary: SlashTrustDeposit defines a governance operation to slash a corporation's trust deposit

UpdateParams defines a (governance) operation for updating the module
parameters. The authority defaults to the x/gov module account.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: MsgUpdateParams is the Msg/UpdateParams request type.

corporation.description: corporation is the group address that owns the trust deposit.

operator.description: operator is the account authorized by the corporation to run this Msg.

verana.td.v1.MsgReclaimTrustDepositYield.title:
MsgReclaimTrustDepositYield defines the request type
[MOD-TD-MSG-2] Reclaim Trust Deposit Yield

corporation.description: corporation is the group address that owns the slashed trust deposit.

operator.description: operator is the account authorized by the corporation to run this Msg.

deposit.description: deposit is the repayment amount (must equal outstanding slashed amount).

verana.td.v1.MsgRepaySlashedTrustDeposit.description:
MsgRepaySlashedTrustDeposit defines the message for repaying a slashed trust deposit.
[MOD-TD-MSG-6] Any authorized operator CAN execute this on behalf of a corporation.

authority.description: authority is the address that controls the module (defaults to x/gov unless overwritten).

corporation_id.title: corporation_id is the registered Corporation id whose trust deposit will be slashed

deposit.title: deposit is the deposit amount to slash (in base denom)

reason.description:
reason for the slash. Implementation-defined: MOD-TD-MSG-5-1 defines no
such parameter; it is recorded on the slash event only.

verana.td.v1.MsgSlashTrustDeposit.title:
MsgSlashTrustDeposit defines the message for slashing a corporation's trust deposit
This can only be executed by the governance module

verana.td.v1.MsgSlashTrustDepositRespons.title: MsgSlashTrustDepositResponse defines the response for MsgSlashTrustDeposit

authority.description: authority is the address that controls the module (defaults to x/gov unless overwritten).

params.description:
params defines the module parameters to update.

NOTE: All parameters must be supplied.

verana.td.v1.MsgUpdateParams.description: MsgUpdateParams is the Msg/UpdateParams request type.

verana.td.v1.MsgUpdateParamsResponse.description:
MsgUpdateParamsResponse defines the response structure for executing a
MsgUpdateParams message.

trust_deposit_max_yield_rate.title: trust_deposit_max_yield_rate is the maximum annualized yield rate (e.g. 0.15 for 15%)

yield_intermediate_pool.title: yield_intermediate_pool is the Bech32 string for the Yield Intermediate Pool module account

trust_deposit_block_reward_share.title: trust_deposit_block_reward_share is the fraction of block rewards allocated to trust deposit yield (e.g. "0.2" for 20%)

verana.td.v1.Params.description: Params defines the parameters for the module.
